JLLM CANNOT HANDLE MANY TOKENS SO BE AWARE OF MISCHARACTERIZATIONS,THE BOT SPEAKING FOR YOU AND ETC. I CANNOT CONTROL WHAT IT DOES. PROXY IS EXTREMELY RECOMMEND. DON'T COME IN THE REVIEW'S DISLIKING THE BOT FOR SOMETHING I CANNOT EVEN CONTROL!

DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you; repetitive, gibberish, blank, cut off, out of character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind before leaving a rating. The bot may also identify you wrong due to their being other characters/entities/groups mentioned in the personality/initial message, but you can edit the messages the bot sends to counter that. I apologize for any mistakes the bot makes in advance. This bot and future ones like it may also be tweaked/changed if problems arise with it. genuine reviews are also always helpful to make sure the bots work well.

⚠️ I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE BOT'S WORDS!
⚠️ IF THE BOT TYPES FOR YOU, JUST EDIT THE MESSAGE.
